languages.text: "Боюсь, что нет. Они были весьма уникальны по своей природе, на поиск новых образцов и восстановление понадобятся годы. Я уверен, что они все еще там, а потому прошу вас об этой услуге".
"I'm afraid not. They were wholly unique. It would take me years to find new samples and regain what was lost. I am certain they are still there, which is why I am asking you for this courtesy."
languages.original_text: "Боюсь, что нет. Они были весьма уникальны по своей природе, на поиск новых образцов и восстановление понадобятся годы. Я уверен, что они все еще там, а потому прошу вас об этой услуге".

traits.locale_text: "I'm afraid not. They were wholly unique. It would take me years to find new samples and regain what was lost. I am certain they are still there, which is why I am asking you for this courtesy."
"I'm afraid not. They were wholly unique. It would take me years to find new samples and regain what was lost. I am certain they are still there, which is why I am asking you for this courtesy."
"I'm afraid not. They were wholly unique. It would take me years to find new samples and regain what was lost. I am certain they are still there, which is why I am asking you for this courtesy."

languages.text: «Me temo que no. Eran algo completamente singular. Tardaría años en obtener otras muestras y recuperar lo perdido. No me cabe duda de que siguen ahí, y es por eso que le pido este favor».
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid not. They were wholly unique. It would take me years to find new samples and regain what was lost. I am certain they are still there, which is why I am asking you for this courtesy."

traits.locale_text: «Me temo que no. Eran algo completamente singular. Tardaría años en obtener otras muestras y recuperar lo perdido. No me cabe duda de que siguen ahí, y es por eso que le pido este favor».

languages.text: “恐怕不行。它们是独一无二的。我要花上好几年的时间，才能找到新样本并追回损失。我确信它们还在那里，所以才恳求您帮忙。”
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid not. They were wholly unique. It would take me years to find new samples and regain what was lost. I am certain they are still there, which is why I am asking you for this courtesy."

traits.locale_text: “恐怕不行。它们是独一无二的。我要花上好几年的时间，才能找到新样本并追回损失。我确信它们还在那里，所以才恳求您帮忙。”

languages.text: « J'ai bien peur que non, car ils étaient absolument uniques. Il me faudrait des années pour trouver d'autres échantillons et les étudier à nouveau. Je suis certain qu'ils sont toujours là-bas, c'est pourquoi je vous demande de consentir à ma requête. »
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid not. They were wholly unique. It would take me years to find new samples and regain what was lost. I am certain they are still there, which is why I am asking you for this courtesy."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai bien peur que non, car ils étaient absolument uniques. Il me faudrait des années pour trouver d'autres échantillons et les étudier à nouveau. Je suis certain qu'ils sont toujours là-bas, c'est pourquoi je vous demande de consentir à ma requête. »

languages.text: "Korkarım hayır. Tamamen eşsizdiler. Yeni numuneler bulmak ve kaybedilenleri geri kazanmak yıllarımı alır. Hâlâ orada olduklarından eminim, bu yüzden gitmemizi rica ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid not. They were wholly unique. It would take me years to find new samples and regain what was lost. I am certain they are still there, which is why I am asking you for this courtesy."

traits.locale_text: "Korkarım hayır. Tamamen eşsizdiler. Yeni numuneler bulmak ve kaybedilenleri geri kazanmak yıllarımı alır. Hâlâ orada olduklarından eminim, bu yüzden gitmemizi rica ediyorum."

languages.text: "Ich fürchte nein. Sie waren wirklich einzigartig. Es hätte Jahre gedauert, neue Proben zu finden und was verloren ging wiederzuerlangen. Ich bin sicher, sie sind noch dort, deshalb bitte ich Euch um diese Gefälligkeit."
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid not. They were wholly unique. It would take me years to find new samples and regain what was lost. I am certain they are still there, which is why I am asking you for this courtesy."

traits.locale_text: "Ich fürchte nein. Sie waren wirklich einzigartig. Es hätte Jahre gedauert, neue Proben zu finden und was verloren ging wiederzuerlangen. Ich bin sicher, sie sind noch dort, deshalb bitte ich Euch um diese Gefälligkeit."

languages.text: 「残念ながらそうではない。彼らは完全にユニークだった。新しいサンプルを見つけて、失われたものを取り戻すには何年もかかる。まだそこにあると確信しているからこそ、このようなご好意をお願いしているのです」。
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid not. They were wholly unique. It would take me years to find new samples and regain what was lost. I am certain they are still there, which is why I am asking you for this courtesy."
